ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

benefit.en: Free LPG connection (deposit-free) plus first refill and stove for adult women in BPL households
benefit.hi: बीपीएल परिवारों की वयस्क महिलाओं के लिए मुफ्त एलपीजी कनेक्शन, पहली रिफिल और चूल्हा

eligibility_rules_human: Adult woman (18 or above) belonging to a BPL household, where no other LPG connection exists in the family in her name or any other family member's name.
required_documents: BPL ration card or SECC verification

application_paths.offline_office_pattern: Nearest LPG distributor of any oil marketing company
offline_steps: Submit KYC form at the LPG distributor
